name: Kashtira Arise-Heart
name_jp: クシャトリラ・アライズハート
desc:
3 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Kashtira Arise-Heart" by using 1 "Kashtira" monster you control, if an effect of "Kashtira Shangri-Ira" was successfully activated this turn. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Any card sent to the GY is banished instead. Once per Chain, each time a card(s) is banished: Attach 1 banished card to this card as material. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 3 materials from this card, then target 1 card on the field; banish it face-down.

eff:
3 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn, you can also Xyz Summon "Kashtira Arise-Heart" by using 1 "Kashtira" monster you control, if an effect of "Kashtira Shangri-Ira" was successfully activated this turn. (Transfer its materials to this card.) Any card sent to the GY is banished instead. Once per Chain, each time a card(s) is banished: Attach 1 banished card to this card as material. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 3 materials from this card, then target 1 card on the field; banish it face-down.

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Activates if other cards are banished
Attaches your banished cards as Xyz Material
Attaches your opponent's banished cards as Xyz Material
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
